nasb.text: “You shall not plant for yourself an Asherah of any kind of tree beside the altar of the Lord your God, which you shall make for yourself.

esv.text: “You shall not plant any tree as an Asherah beside the altar of the Lord your God that you shall make.

cnv.text: “在你為耶和華你的　神築的祭壇旁邊，不可栽種甚麼樹木，作亞舍拉。

ccb.text: “在为你们的上帝耶和华建造的祭坛旁，你们不可竖立亚舍拉木神像，
